AcceptFinancingApplicationTerms.description: Grants permission to accept financing application terms provided by a lender

CreateFinancingApplication.description: Grants permission to create a financing application

CreatePaymentInstrument.description: Grants permission to create a payment instrument

DeletePaymentInstrument.description: Grants permission to delete a payment instrument

GetFinancingApplication.description: Grants permission to get information about a financing application

GetFinancingLine.description: Grants permission to get information about a financing line

GetFinancingLineWithdrawal.description: Grants permission to get information about a financing line withdrawal

GetFinancingOption.description: Grants permission to get information about a financing option

GetPaymentInstrument.description: Grants permission to get information about a payment instrument

GetPaymentStatus.description: Grants permission to get payment status of invoices

ListFinancingApplications.description: Grants permission to list financing application metadata

ListFinancingLineWithdrawals.description: Grants permission to list financing line withdrawals metadata

ListFinancingLines.description: Grants permission to list financing line metadata

ListPaymentInstruments.description: Grants permission to list payment instrument metadata

ListPaymentPreferences.description: Grants permission to get payment preferences (preferred payment currency, preferred payment method, etc.)

ListPaymentProgramOptions.description: Grants permission to list information about payment options

ListPaymentProgramStatus.description: Grants permission to list information about payment program eligibility and enrolment status

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags on a payment resource

MakePayment.description: Grants permission to make a payment, authenticate a payment, verify a payment method, and generate a funding request document for Advance Pay

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a payment resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a payment resource

UpdateFinancingApplication.description: Grants permission to update a financing application

UpdatePaymentInstrument.description: Grants permission to update a payment instrument

UpdatePaymentPreferences.description: Grants permission to update payment preferences (preferred payment currency, preferred payment method, etc.)

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
